name: 55. Hunting Cottage and Barn
entries: The hunting cottage is a vital logistical node for the operations of the Temple of Elemental Evil. Located south of Nulb and near the Imeryd's Run, this unassuming log structure masks a sinister purpose: it serves as a supply depot, a slave-handling station, and a gateway into the Temple itself. Hidden deep within the Gnarley Forest, it is a place of grim purpose and dark machinations, overseen by loyal agents of the Greater Temple and guarded by Deggum's men.

items: {@b Structure:} A rustic log hunting Cottage and barn with a simple but sturdy construction, sitting near the ford of a meandering stream.
{@b Water Well:} Weed and algae crusted water well.
{@b Surroundings:} Dense woods encircle the Cottage, though a wide, well-worn path leads directly to it, bearing wagon ruts from regular supply deliveries.

entries.name: Hidden Tunnel Operations
entries: The tunnel connects directly to the Greater Temple's Broken Tower. Most of the traffic includes essential goods, weapons, and slaves, ensuring the Temple remains stocked without raising suspicion in Nulb.

entries.name: Deadly Traps
entries: Deadly traps concealed within thick underbrush surrounding the cottage and barn.
Carefully reset daily by Ralf and rotating patrol bandits, ensuring constant vigilance.

entries.name: Dire Hounds
entries: Three ferocious dire hounds patrol the immediate cottage grounds.
Trained to respond solely to Gefreid's commands, attacking intruders without hesitation.

entries.name: Tunnel Security
entries: The concealed tunnel entrance is constantly guarded by pairs of well-armed bandits, rotating shifts every few hours.
Rune-marked alarm stones linked directly to Temple spellcasters alert Gefreid and Feldrin to intrusion attempts.

entries.name: Natural Cave Outpost (Bugbear & Goblin Guards)
entries: Midway along the tunnel, a recently excavated passage connects to a natural cave serving as a fortified checkpoint.
A band of disciplined {@creature Bugbear}s and {@creature Goblin}s under Temple command monitor this critical junction, demanding passwords or tokens of authority from passing personnel.

entries.name: Guarded Water Well (Giant Rats)
entries: The secret tunnel ultimately terminates near an old, stone-lined water well deep below the Greater Temple complex.
This final passage is infested with aggressive {@creature Giant Rat}s purposefully bred and released to attack intruders and deter unauthorized access.
